case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. VS. PEARL SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. SERVED OCT-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, PEARL
DECLARATION MICHAEL KAHN FILED RE: REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, PEARL $5,727.00 PRINCIPAL, $157.88 INTEREST, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,152.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $237.52 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, PEARL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, PEARL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, PEARL DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2011

DECLARATION TIMOTHY WOOD FILED RE: CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.
